title: SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS=0 silently blocks all subscription requests without operator warning
description: If SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS=0, max_days=0 is set with no startup error. In SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST, 'params.duration_days as u64 > max_days' is true for any duration_days >= 1, so every request returns 'duration_days exceeds maximum'. The relay accepts payment config (MERCHANT_DFVK set) but silently denies all invoices. main.rs should reject SUBSCRIPTION_DAYS=0 the same way it rejects SUBSCRIPTION_PRICE_ZATOSHI=0.
